Eligibility: Children born in San Francisco in 2026 (eligible ZIP codes). Exact amount depends on final applicant count.
Connecticut children age 9 or under who did not receive the federal $1,000 seed, in ZIPs with median income ≤ $150,000. ~87% of CT ZIPs qualify.
Indiana children age 4 or under who did not receive the federal $1,000 seed.
Oklahoma children under 18 (U.S. citizens with primary residence in OK). Requires family application and verification by the State Treasurer.
Children born in Wyoming during 2026. Dollar amount not yet published.
